content.en:
"Ye Tian, ​​the Fog Pavilion naturally has treasures that can assist in comprehending the ultimate Chonggong rules. One of them is the Fog Monument. The Fog Monument is a treasure found in the strange gray fog area, but there are some risks in comprehending the Fog Monument. If the will is not strong, it is easy to be affected by the Fog Monument. Once affected by the Fog Monument, it is easy to absorb the gray fog and become a fog beast!"

Yang Yuan said.

"Fog beast?"

Although Ye Tian has never seen a fog beast, he thinks that this strange gray fog should be a very strange thing that can transform the Chonggong and the body of the cultivator, and it must not be absorbed and refined.

"Six two "Six two three" three"

"What kind of will is needed to counter the power of the fog monument?" Ye Tian continued to ask.

"If the will is only at the extreme of the 36th Heaven, then it can only comprehend the Mist Monument for ten years, and it is not allowed to comprehend within 100 million years, otherwise it will still be affected. If the will reaches the ultimate will realm, it can comprehend for tens of thousands of years, and it only takes one million years to comprehend again." Yang Yuan said.

"Ultimate will!"

Ye Tian is very clear about his will. The essence of his clone is still his own will, so his will is very tenacious. Now it is enough to match the ultimate will of the extreme, but the strength is far less than the ultimate will of the true eternal ultimate palace master.

"What if the will reaches the ultimate will of the extreme?"

Ye Tian asked this question.

Yang Yuan smiled and said: "If you condense the ultimate will of the extreme, you will not be affected by the fog monument at all, and you can comprehend it with your will, but those who condense the ultimate will of the extreme are the eternal ultimate palace masters, and we have three eternal ultimate palace masters in the fog pavilion!"

The ultimate will of the extreme can always comprehend the fog monument, but Ye Tian dare not really comprehend the fog monument all the time, otherwise how to explain that he has reached the ultimate will of the extreme?

At that time, the three eternal ultimate palace masters will definitely investigate him, and at that time, the fact that he is a clone will definitely not be concealed from the three eternal ultimate palace masters who are at the same level.

Therefore, he does not want to attract the attention of the three eternal ultimate palace masters yet. He will comprehend the fog monument in a short period of time, and then go out to train for a period of time to expose the news that he has condensed the ultimate will, so that he can comprehend it for tens of thousands of palace years.

"What are the conditions for comprehending the fog monument?"

Ye Tian asked.

"You can comprehend it once with 10,000 contribution points, and there is no time limit!" Yang Yuan said.

Ye Tian now has about 100,000 contribution points, and he can comprehend ten times.

So, he applied for a comprehended session first.

Very quickly.

Yang Yuan applied for Ye Tian, ​​but he needed to go to the headquarters of the Mist Pavilion to see the Mist Monument.

Since Ye Tian had never been to the headquarters, Yang Yuan personally took Ye Tian there. They were very fast, crossing many voids and soon arrived at the Mist Pavilion headquarters.

The headquarters of the Mist Pavilion was somewhat beyond Ye Tian's expectations. It was actually at the edge of the Mist Region, very close to the strange gray mist.Area.

Headquarters of Fog Pavilion.

In a void.. .......

A strange gray monument is located here.. .......

When Ye Tian came here, he saw many practitioners, all of whom were at the 36th level of the Heaven, and there were also a few Ultimate Palace Masters who were here to comprehend.

Ye Tian came here, chose a location, and then began to comprehend.

He had just comprehended and sensed the strange gray fog energy, but he would not absorb it and excluded it. When he was comprehending the Fog Monument, this power kept interfering with it. If he comprehended it for a long time, he would not be able to stop its invasion.

Ye Tian could easily resist this power. He seriously comprehended the Ultimate Palace Rules contained in the Fog Monument. This was also his first time to directly comprehend the Ultimate Palace Rules.

The Ultimate Palace Rules that everyone comprehends are different, and what Ye Tian needs to comprehend is the Ultimate Palace Rules of All Laws.

Time passed slowly, and soon ten Chonggong years were up, and he immediately left 2.5.

After 2.5 years, he said goodbye to Yang Yuan and went out to experience for a period of time.

However, after only tens of thousands of Chonggong years, he came back and told Yang Yuan that he had condensed the ultimate will, which shocked Yang Yuan.

He never expected that Ye Tian would condense the ultimate will so quickly.

After that, Ye Tian applied to comprehend the Mist Monument again, and this time he could rest assured to comprehend for tens of thousands of Chonggong years.

With tens of thousands of Chonggong years of comprehension, with his comprehension and perception, he can definitely comprehend the ultimate Chonggong rules! .
